phases.title: Critical Blockers
phases.goal: Fix the 6 release-blocking issues identified in the assessment. No phase 2 until all pass build+typecheck.

tasks.title: Remove SQLite .db file and migrate to PostgreSQL
tasks.description: Find and delete any .db files tracked in git. Replace SQLite DbContext configuration in BeachRehberi.API with a PostgreSQL provider (Npgsql). Update appsettings.json with a connection string placeholder. Ensure EF migrations are compatible with PostgreSQL. Do not seed real data.
tasks.reason: Cross-file architecture change touching DbContext, appsettings, and Program.cs requires large-model coordination.

tasks.title: Gate MockPaymentService behind feature flag
tasks.description: Locate MockPaymentService in the backend. Add a feature flag (e.g. appsettings key `Features:UseRealPayment`). When flag is false, return a clear 503/501 response instead of fake success. Do not wire Stripe yet. Remove any code paths that create reservations without payment confirmation.
tasks.reason: Scoped change to one service + appsettings; gemini is sufficient for this contained edit.

tasks.title: Resolve duplicate project structure
tasks.description: Audit the repo: there are two AuthControllers, two Domain/Application folders (root-level BeachRehberi.Domain/Application and nested under BeachRehberi.API/). Determine which set is active (the nested API/BeachRehberi.* set). Delete the stale root-level duplicates. Fix the docker-compose `./backend` path reference to point to the correct directory. Ensure BeachRehberi.API.sln only references the live projects.
tasks.reason: Structural cleanup spanning many directories and solution files; requires careful cross-file reasoning.

tasks.title: Fix admin revenue calculation
tasks.description: Find the admin dashboard revenue computation (`totalReservations * 500m` or similar hardcoded constant). Replace it with a real aggregation from the reservations table (sum of actual payment amounts). If payment amounts are not yet stored, add an `Amount` column to the reservations entity and populate it at reservation creation time.
tasks.reason: Localized fix in one query/service; no architecture change required.

tasks.title: Harden guest cancellation endpoint
tasks.description: Find the guest cancellation endpoint that uses an 8-char confirmation code. Add rate limiting (e.g. 5 attempts per IP per 15 minutes) using ASP.NET Core rate limiting middleware or a simple in-memory policy. Increase confirmation code entropy to at least 12 cryptographically random alphanumeric characters for new reservations. Do not break existing reservations.
tasks.reason: Requires middleware setup, rate limiting configuration, and a migration for the code length change — cross-cutting concern.

tasks.title: Move accessToken out of localStorage
tasks.description: In beach-ui, find all usages of localStorage.setItem/getItem for accessToken. Switch to an in-memory store (React context/state or a module-level variable). The refresh token should remain in the HttpOnly cookie (already done on backend). Update axios/fetch interceptors to use the in-memory token. On page reload, trigger silent refresh via the cookie.
tasks.reason: Cross-component frontend refactor touching auth context, interceptors, and multiple pages.

phases.title: Correctness & Security
phases.goal: Ensure reservation flows, auth, and data integrity are correct after phase-1 structural fixes.

tasks.title: Audit and deduplicate src/pages paths
tasks.description: The assessment notes src/pages/ exists both at the repo root and under beach-ui/src/. After phase-1 cleanup, confirm which is the active React route tree. Remove the stale copy. Update any imports that still reference the deleted path.
tasks.reason: Verification and small deletion; follows structural cleanup done in phase-1-task-3.

tasks.title: Validate reservation wizard end-to-end
tasks.description: Trace the reservation creation flow from frontend wizard → API endpoint → DB. Confirm no step calls MockPaymentService unconditionally. Ensure the feature-flagged gate from phase-1-task-2 is exercised correctly. Fix any broken state transitions in the wizard when payment is unavailable.
tasks.reason: Read-heavy audit with targeted fixes; second-pass validation after phase-1 changes.

tasks.title: Add input validation on all public endpoints
tasks.description: Using the existing FluentValidation setup, verify that every public API endpoint (especially reservation creation and cancellation) has a validator registered. Add missing validators. Ensure 400 responses are returned for invalid input rather than 500s.
tasks.reason: Repetitive validator addition; well-scoped per endpoint.

phases.title: Maintainability & Refactor
phases.goal: Clean up architectural debt that survived phases 1-2 so the codebase can be iterated on safely.

tasks.title: Consolidate CQRS handlers to single Application layer
tasks.description: After duplicate project removal, ensure all MediatR Commands/Queries/Handlers live exclusively in BeachRehberi.Application. Remove any handler definitions left in the API project itself. Update DI registration in Program.cs to scan only the canonical assembly.
tasks.reason: Architecture-level consolidation across multiple files and namespaces.

tasks.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline skeleton
tasks.description: Create a minimal GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`) that: (1) builds the .NET solution, (2) runs `npm run build` in beach-ui, (3) runs dotnet test if test projects exist. Reference the corrected docker-compose paths from phase-1-task-3. Do not add deployment steps yet.
tasks.reason: YAML scaffolding with known commands; no complex logic.

phases.title: Tests, Docs & Cleanup
phases.goal: Add baseline test coverage, remove stale artifacts, and document the stabilized architecture.

tasks.title: Add xUnit tests for cancellation endpoint
tasks.description: Create a test project (BeachRehberi.Tests) under the solution. Write integration or unit tests for the guest cancellation endpoint: (1) valid code succeeds, (2) invalid code 404s, (3) rate limit triggers on 6th attempt. Use WebApplicationFactory or mock the rate limiter.
tasks.reason: New test project setup + non-trivial test cases requiring cross-file scaffolding.

tasks.title: Remove stale automation/ scripts
tasks.description: The old automation/ directory files are already deleted from the working tree (shown in git status as staged deletions). Commit the deletions. Verify no other file in the repo references paths under automation/.
tasks.reason: Simple git operation + grep check; no code change.

tasks.title: Mobile safe area and keyboard overflow audit
tasks.description: In beach-ui, audit the reservation wizard and main layout for safe-area-inset CSS (notch support) and virtual keyboard overflow. Add `env(safe-area-inset-*)` padding where missing. Test viewport meta tag is correct. Document any remaining mobile gaps in a MOBILE_GAPS.md file.
tasks.reason: CSS audit with targeted additions; well-scoped to the UI layer.
